jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe
jobs.location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities Develop high quality, responsive, mobile-friendly Vue.js apps Create amazing interactions and visualizations Work closely with our Back-end engineers and our UI designers Help bridge the gap between server and client (consuming RESTful APIs) Write unit and functional tests Requirements Professional experience with Vue.js A firm understanding of how to write maintainable and scalable CSS with Sass. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team retreat Salary range: €60k – €90k Location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)

score.reason: Primary Vue role with TypeScript bonus; Spain explicitly listed in remote-first structure. Senior-level match to Alfonso's expertise—standard frontend fundamentals, no missing technologies.

jobs.title: Senior Developer FullStack (Vue y Nodejs). Inglés alto.
jobs.rawDescription: ¡Atención, amante de la tecnología! Si eres una persona curiosa, creativa y con pasión por la innovación, ¡esta oportunidad es para ti! En nuestro equipo, buscamos mentes inquietas como la tuya, dispuestas a formar parte de Comunidades tecnológicas donde construir conjuntamente. ¡Prepárate para un viaje emocionante! Pero antes de nada, ¿nos presentamos? Somos atmira, un ecosistema de interacción centrado en las personas. Nuestro objetivo es ayudarte a desarrollarte tanto personal como profesionalmente. A través de nuestro Club, podrás relacionarte, vivir experiencias profesionales y alcanzar tus metas. En atmira, tú eres el protagonista y tienes el poder de explorar tu potencial con #Icouldbe Y ahora que ya nos conocemos un poco más… ¿A qué te vas a dedicar? Trabajarás en un proyecto junto a uno de nuestros clientes donde podrás realizar desarrollos y dar apoyo técnico al mismo. Tus funciones principales serán las siguientes: • Participar en el análisis funcional de las necesidades del usuario (Kanban/Agile). • Elaborar diseños técnicos basados en especificaciones funcionales. • Analizar y desarrollar componentes utilizando lenguajes definidos e interfaces. • contribuir al desarrollo y la implementación de aplicaciones (prototipos y módulos). • Documentar todo el trabajo de desarrollo, componentes y módulos según los estándares. • Participar en revisiones de código. • Definir protocolos y escenarios de pruebas de integración. • Realizar pruebas, identificar y resolver cualquier problema. • Participar en el mantenimiento correctivo y evolutivo de todas las aplicaciones desarrolladas. • Proponer mejoras durante las reuniones técnicas. Con qué tecnología trabajarás principalmente? Trabajarás con Vue.js, Node.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, MVC, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Linux, TDD, GIT, SCRUM, Kanban. Es necesario un nivel de inglés alto porque es un proyecto internacional. ¿Te resulta interesante? Tenemos más que contarte: 🌱 Un fantástico equipo de personas que te ayudará

score.reason: Strong match: Vue.js as primary framework, Node.js fullstack at Alfonso's proficiency level, perfect location (remote, Spain-based), Spanish-language role with solid Agile/TDD practices.

jobs.title: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue)
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bulgaria, Bosnia, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Romania, Serbia, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Finland, Norway, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Germany, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. 🎯 Your main goal will be to build and ship end-to-end TypeScript product features that customers feel in their workflows the same week - balancing speed, quality, and high security standards. To do so, you’ll own outcomes across the full stack and stay close to users, product, and metrics: End-to-end product ownership Own a product area surface from discovery to delivery, including iteration after launch. Ship high-quality features fast across the TypeScript stack, balancing UX, performance, and maintainability. Partner closely with Product to translate customer problems into clear scopes and

score.reason: Strong Vue+TS match with perfect location/seniority fit. Node basics are a minor gap in a full-stack role, but the emphasis on TS/Vue product engineering suits Alfonso well.

jobs.title: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers
jobs.rawDescription: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers Blackshark AI | Software Engineers & Platform Engineers | Full-time | Austria or Remote EU Hours | VISA sponsorship available We build geospatial AI infrastructure. Our platform lets analysts train custom object and change detection models on satellite/aerial/drone imagery in minutes, then reconstructs 3D terrain from those detections. We just shipped a planetary-scale simulation platform with Lockheed Martin powered by Unreal Engine. If you want to work on distributed systems that run in a data center one day and an edge laptop the next, we have interesting problems. Our training and inference infrastructure is processing trillions of pixels and we deliver real world impact for our customers across defense, intelligence, and local governments. Tech Stack: Python, Fast API, PyTorch, Postgres, Redis, Vue.js Infrastructure Stack: Kubernetes & Docker, Linux, AWS & Azure, Azure DevOps, Terraform, ELK, Prometheus & Grafana, ArgoCD & Helm Roles: Software Engineer - Frontend UI https://jobs.eu.lever.co/blackshark/5c596b85-5134-4601-be25-... Software Engineer - Data Plane Team: https://jobs.eu.lever.co/blackshark/6110fedd-5cd8-40e5-ac11-... Platform Engineer - Deployment Team: https://jobs.eu.lever.co/blackshark/56a85834-d986-4105-9cc8-... or reach out to HM with questions at: 'eivanov@' + username[:-2] + '.' + username[-2:].lower() Location: Austria or Remote EU Hours

score.reason: Vue.js primary framework and remote EU hours align with Alfonso's location and expertise. TypeScript absence is a notable gap for a senior engineer, and the company's emphasis on AI/geospatial infrastructure (PyTorch, satellite imagery, distributed systems) is a specialized domain where frontend UI may not be strategically central.
red_flags: TypeScript not mentioned in tech stack
Frontend role secondary to platform focus

jobs.title: Desarrollador/a Frontend Vue.js - Remoto/Híbrido
jobs.rawDescription: Una entidad bancaria internacional busca un Desarrollador Frontend VUE para unirse a su equipo en Madrid. Experiencia, cualificaciones y habilidades interpersonales, ¿tiene todo lo necesario para triunfar en esta oportunidad? Descúbralo a continuación. Este profesional será responsable de desarrollar y mantener la arquitectura Front Web de la compañía, con un enfoque en crear componentes escalables y eficientes. Se requiere experiencia de al menos 3 años en Vue.JS y un sólido conocimiento de javascript, HTML, y CSS. El puesto ofrece un contrato indefinido y una jornada laboral completa, con modalidad de teletrabajo híbrido, remuneración competitiva entre 40k y 60k anuales. xbhjioe #J-18808-Ljbffr Hay opciones de teletrabajo/trabajo desde casa disponibles para este puesto.

score.reason: Strong Vue fit as primary framework with 3+ years required, but this is a mid-level role—well below Alfonso's senior/lead+ target. TypeScript unmentioned (gap for modern Vue work), and salary €40–60K sits below his range.

jobs.title: Front End vue/nuxt 100% remoto
jobs.rawDescription: ¿De qué va la empresa en la que trabajarás? Somos Slashmobility una empresa boutique especializada en transformación digital y comprometida con las personas. Nuestro propósito se centra en acompañar a nuestros clientes en su impulso a la aceleración digital tecnológica a través de las apps y el talento IT. Con +14 años de experiencia , un equipo comprometido , +500 proyectos ejecutados con éxito , hemos acompañado a centenares de clientes líderes en su sector desde la confianza, flexibilidad y solidez a enfrentarse a los desafíos de la aceleración digital de la sociedad. ¿Y qué nos hace especiales? Nos basamos en cuatro valores fundamentales: • Innovación, ofreciendo soluciones innovadoras de una manera profesional y rentable con un valor diferencial: el conocimiento experto en toda la cadena de valor. • Compromiso ya que llevamos como propios los objetivos de la organización y superamos cualquier obstáculo para lograrlos. • Proactividad, proveyendo y realizando acciones para mejorar sus servicios y calidad. • Trabajo en equipo, contando con un equipo motivado y multidisciplinar que trabaja en perfecta coordinación para lograr los objetivos comunes. • Experiencia como Frontend Developer • Experiencia con los frameworks de JavaScript (Vue 3 y/o Nuxt3) • Conocimientos en ECMASript, HTML, CSS • Experiencia con Unix y Nginx (es un plus) • Full-remote

score.reason: Vue 3 expert match with excellent location fit (Spain-based, Spanish-speaking company). However, role appears mid-level and notably lacks TypeScript and modern tooling—Alfonso would be significantly overqualified.

needsReview.title: Senior Developer
needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Developer - Creative AI Team, Sanoma B2B Digital Growth Are you passionate about building smart, scalable digital solutions that support the full lifecycle of advertising creatives? We're looking for an enthusiastic Senior Developer to help shape the future of digital growth in Sanoma's B2B Digital Growth Domain. As a Senior Developer, you'll join Sanoma B2B's Software Engineering Competence and work in the Creative AI Team, where we modernize and build digital advertising products and services using modern front-end and back-end technologies. You'll be part of an agile team, building AI enhanced advertising material solutions and infrastructure development, work within cross-functional teams composed of professionals with complementary skills and shared goals, led by a Team Lead. We drive and deliver digital advertising across all Sanoma media brands (e.g. Ilta-Sanomat, Helsingin Sanomat, Ruutu, Aamulehti, Supla ) using our tech stack. We also manage numerous integrations with advertising partners and data platforms to meet business-specific needs. You'll collaborate closely with Digital Business, Ad Operations (Ad-Ops), Ad Manager, Data Science, Display & Video Adverting, and other Software Development Teams across Sanoma's Media Units. Your Role You'll primarily focus on backend and API development and using modern AI tools, while also having the possibility to contribute towards front development and build new services within Creative AI. What We're Looking For Must-Haves: 8+ years of experience in software development Experience with C#, .NET stack, and Entity Framework Experience with Azure cloud services, including hosting and running applications on Azure (Container Apps, Azure Functions), Azure SQL, Blob Storage, Service Bus, API Management, App Configuration (feature flags), and Application Insights. Infrastructure-as-code experience using Bicep is a plus. Strong backend engineering experience, including APIs, databases, and system integrations A te

score.reason: Backend infrastructure role (C#/.NET/Azure) with zero Vue.js requirement. Alfonso specializes in frontend UI; this role demands deep backend engineering, APIs, and cloud infrastructure expertise he doesn't have. Helsinki-based with no remote indication.
red_flags: Vue not in tech stack at all

needsReview.title: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js)
needsReview.rawDescription: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js) About Voodoo Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz. Team The Engineering & Data team builds innovative tech products and platforms to support the impressive growth of their gaming and consumer apps which allow Voodoo to stay at the forefront of the mobile gaming industry. Role We’re looking for an Engineering Lead (TypeScript/Node.js) to join our Engineering & Data team. As an Engineering Lead, you'll combine strong individual technical contributions with team leadership. You'll be responsible for the technical direction of your squad, the growth of your engineers, and the delivery of high-impact projects. This is a hybrid IC/manager role — you'll still write code, but your leverage is through the team. Lead the technical direction and architecture for your squad's domain Drive design reviews, set coding standards, and ensure engineering excellence Own the full delivery of complex, cross-team technical initiatives Build, scale and operate Node.js/TypeScript backend services on AWS/EKS Define the infrastructure and reliability strategy for your team's systems Partner with Product and Data to translate business goals into technical roadmaps Grow engineers through 1:1s, code reviews, mentorship and technical coaching Identify systemic risks and drive improvements before they become incidents Be an ambassador for engineering culture: psychological safety, pragmatism, and craft Profile (MUST have) 7+ years of professional software engineering experience 2+ years of experience leading an engineering team (formal or informal) Expert-level proficiency in TypeScript

score.reason: Backend engineering lead role with no Vue.js in stack (violates F1 hard requirement). Hybrid Paris position requires relocation from Spain; role is backend/infrastructure-focused, not frontend/UI.

Vahva kokemuksemme eri toimialoilta auttaa julkisen ja yksityisen sektorin asiakkaitamme onnistumaan digitaalisessa muutoksessa ja saavuttamaan tavoitteitaan entistä tehokkaammin. Haemme kokenutta Full Stack -kehittäjää Cloud Native -yksikköömme vahvistamaan kaupan toimialan osaamistamme CGI:n Cloud Native -tiimissä rakennamme maailmanluokan digitaalisia ratkaisuja moderneilla teknologioilla, hyödyntäen pilvipalveluita ja tekoälyä. Kehittämämme erityisesti skaalautuvia ja liiketoimintakriittisiä ratkaisuja kaupan toimialalle, kuten verkkokaupparatkaisuja, jotka tukevat asiakkaidemme kasvua ja asiakaskokemuksen kehittämistä. Työskentelemme merkittävien suomalaisten ja kansainvälisten toimijoiden kanssa, ja meillä on vahva jalansija kaupan toimialalla. Toteutamme digitaalisia palveluita ja verkkokaupparatkaisuja mm. Keskolle, Postille, Sanomalle, Finnairille ja Matkahuollolle - muutamia esimerkkejä mainitaksemme. Projektimme liittyvät esimerkiksi asiakaspolkujen optimointiin sekä monikanavaisten kaupankäyntikokemuksen kehittämiseen. Mitä teknologioita käytämme? Seuraamme aktiivisesti alan ja teknologioiden kehitystä. Edellytämme vähintään kuuden vuoden kokemusta seuraavista: Pilvipalvelut • AWS / Azure • Pääosin serverless-arkkitehtuurilla toteutetut ratkaisut Ohjelmointikielet ja -ympäristöt • JavaScript / TypeScript • Node.js Modernit frontend-teknologiat • React, Next.js, Gatsby.js, Vue DevOps ja automaatio • CI/CD (automaatioputket) • Kontit (Docker, Kubernetes) • Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation) Lisäksi arvostamme kokemusta mobiilikehityksestä sekä ymmärrystä verkkokauppojen erityispiirteistä, kuten suorituskyvyn optimoinnista, integraatioista (maksu-, logistiikka- ja tuotejärjestelmät) sekä datavetoisesta kehittämisestä. Tehtävässä onnistuminen edellyttää myös käytännön kokemusta tekoälyn hyödyntämisestä ohjelmistokehityksessä esim
